name: editable-recipe
visual_summary: editable-recipe is a editable recipe UI component from the parkui corpus. It provides reusable table behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready table component with the following characteristics:

Name: editable-recipe
Description: editable-recipe is a editable recipe UI component from the parkui corpus. It provides reusable table behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: utility-styled
Interactions: animated, hover, keyboard-focus
Tags: editable, parkui, recipe, table

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
